def positive_function_body_contains_setup_validation_execution_and_formatting_all_at_once():
    rule_id = "function_body_contains_setup_validation_execution_and_formatting_all_at_once"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag functions that pack too many lifecycle phases into one body."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
